claims.text: Constructing effective models of Cyber-Physical Systems is difficult and time-consuming due to the inherent complexity of CPS.
claims.source_quote: Constructing such models is difficult and time-consuming due to the inherent complexity of CPS.

claims.text: Data-driven model generation using machine learning methods is gaining popularity for Cyber-Physical Systems.
claims.source_quote: As a result, data-driven model generation using machine learning methods is gaining popularity.

claims.text: Flowcean is a novel framework designed to automate the generation of models through data-driven learning.
claims.source_quote: we present Flowcean, a novel framework designed to automate the generation of models through data-driven learning

claims.text: Flowcean focuses on modularity and usability.
claims.source_quote: a novel framework designed to automate the generation of models through data-driven learning that focuses on modularity and usability

claims.text: Flowcean offers various learning strategies, data processing methods, and evaluation metrics.
claims.source_quote: By offering various learning strategies, data processing methods, and evaluation metrics, our framework provides a comprehensive solution

claims.text: Flowcean is tailored to Cyber-Physical Systems scenarios.
claims.source_quote: our framework provides a comprehensive solution, tailored to CPS scenarios

claims.text: Flowcean facilitates the integration of diverse learning libraries and tools within a modular and flexible architecture.
claims.source_quote: Flowcean facilitates the integration of diverse learning libraries and tools within a modular and flexible architecture

claims.text: Flowcean ensures adaptability to a wide range of modeling tasks.
claims.source_quote: ensuring adaptability to a wide range of modeling tasks

claims.text: Flowcean streamlines the process of model generation and evaluation, making it more efficient and accessible.
claims.source_quote: This streamlines the process of model generation and evaluation, making it more efficient and accessible.
